channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Entra role
item.description:
Id: f42252d9-5400-4d7b-b9ef-cc582dbb8577
Display name: Entra Backup Reader
Description: Read all aspects of Microsoft Entra Backup, such as list all preview jobs, recovery jobs, backup snapshots, and create preview jobs.
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/f42252d9-5400-4d7b-b9ef-cc582dbb8577

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Entra role
item.description:
Id: b6a27b2b-f905-4b2e-81b5-0d90e0ef1fdb
Display name: Entra Backup Administrator
Description: Manage all aspects of Microsoft Entra Backup, such as create recovery jobs and manage backup snapshots.
Link: https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/directoryRoleTemplates/b6a27b2b-f905-4b2e-81b5-0d90e0ef1fdb
